basic_details.job_title: IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu) has published the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. IITJMU/RC/RP-100350/A-27 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position. Candidates up to 30 years of age (age relaxation applicable as per rules) holding a B.Tech/ B.E. in Civil Engineering and an M.Tech/ M.E. in Structural Engineering, Construction Engineering, or a related field with a minimum CGPA of 6.5 (or 65%) are eligible to apply online on or before 25 July 2026. The official notification PDF and

age_limit.age_details: Max 30 years (Relaxable for SC/ST/Women/PH by 3 years, OBC(NCL) by 2 years)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/Women/Physically Handicapped: 3 years OBC (NCL): 2 years

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E. or equivalent degree in Civil Engineering with a minimum CGPA of 6.5 (or 65%) and M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent degree in Structural Engineering, Construction Engineering, or a related field with a minimum CGPA of 6.5 (or 65%).
qualification.details: B.Tech/B.E. or equivalent degree in Civil Engineering with a minimum CGPA of 6.5 (or 65%). M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent degree in Structural Engineering, Construction Engineering, or a related field with a minimum CGPA of 6.5 (or 65%). Hands-on experience in concrete and structural testing laboratories is desirable.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.37,000/- per month + HRA (as per project norms)
salary_details.details: For GATE qualified candidates: Rs.37,000/- per month + HRA (as per project norms) For others: Rs. 30,000 per month + HRA

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and project requirement Interview (Offline or Online)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Jammu Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Jammu JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Jammu is 25th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech/B.E. degree in Civil Engineering and an M.Tech/M.E. degree in Structural Engineering, Construction Engineering, or a related field, both with a minimum CGPA of 6.5 or 65%.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 30 years. Age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST/Women/PH and OBC (NCL) categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: For GATE-qualified candidates, the salary is Rs. 37,000/- per month plus HRA. For other candidates, the salary is Rs. 30,000 per month plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT Jammu JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official application portal of IIT Jammu by the last date. Details on how to apply are provided in the official notification and the "How to Apply" section.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates regarding fees.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit and project requirements, followed by an interview, which may be conducted offline or online.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT Jammu offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, IIT Jammu offers age relaxation for SC/ST/Women/Physically Handicapped candidates by 3 years and for OBC (NCL) candidates by 2 years, as per government rules.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any preferred experience for the JRF role?
faq.answer: Hands-on experience in concrete and structural testing laboratories is considered desirable for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official website of IIT Jammu for more information.
